test.name: Le Tableau De Bord Doit Etre Visible Après Une Connexion Réussie

kw.name: Ouvrir Le Navigateur Et Accéder A L'Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Accéder A La Page De Connexion
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Vérifier Que Le Tableau De Bord Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.msg: Page title is 'Tableau de bord - Livraison 3'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

test.name: Le Lien De Deconnexion Devrait Etre Visible Après Une Déconnexion Réussie

kw.name: Ouvrir Le Navigateur Et Accéder A L'Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Accéder A La Page De Connexion
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Vérifier Que Le Tableau De Bord Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.msg: Page title is 'Tableau de bord - Livraison 3'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Vérifier Que Le Lien De Connexion Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: La Modale De Contact Doit S'afficher Après Un Clic Sur Le Bouton Contactez L'hôte

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

test.name: Le Formulaire De Contact Doit Pouvoir Être Soumis Avec Des Informations Valides

kw.name: Ouvrir Le Navigateur Et Accéder A La Page De L Annonce
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Cliquer Sur Le Bouton Contactez L'hôte
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Vérifier Que La Modale De Contact Hôte Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Remplir Le Formulaire De Contact Hôte
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Jean Dupont' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'jean.dupont@email.fr' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '0601020304' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='phone']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Bonjour, cette annonce est-elle toujours disponible aux dates du 15 au 20 juillet ?' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host textarea[name='message']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.arg: Bonjour, cette annonce est-elle toujours disponible aux dates du 15 au 20 juillet ?

Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Les Informations Saisies Doivent Être Conservées Dans Les Champs Du Formulaire De Contact

kw.name: Ouvrir Le Navigateur Et Accéder A La Page De L Annonce
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Vérifier Que La Modale De Contact Hôte Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Remplir Le Formulaire De Contact Hôte
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Marie Martin' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'marie.martin@email.fr' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '0712345678' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='phone']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Est-ce que les animaux sont acceptés ?' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host textarea[name='message']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.arg: Est-ce que les animaux sont acceptés ?

kw.name: Vérifier Que Les Champs Du Formulaire De Contact Hôte Contiennent Les Valeurs Saisies
Textfield Value Should Be
kw.msg: Content of text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='name']' is 'Marie Martin'.
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Textfield Value Should Be
kw.msg: Content of text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='email']' is 'marie.martin@email.fr'.
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Textfield Value Should Be
kw.msg: Content of text field 'css=#modal-contact-host input[name='phone']' is '0712345678'.
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Textarea Value Should Be
kw.msg: Content of text area 'css=#modal-contact-host textarea[name='message']' is 'Est-ce que les animaux sont acceptés ?'.
kw.doc: Verifies text area ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.arg: Est-ce que les animaux sont acceptés ?

test.name: Le Formulaire De Contact Doit Pouvoir Être Soumis Avec Des Informations Valides Depuis Le Lien Contacter L'hôte

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Bonjour, quelle est l'heure d'arrivée possible le jour de la réservation ?' into text field 'css=#modal-contact-host textarea[name='message']'.
